messages.content: You output JSON for task plans.

You are a senior project planner producing structured task plans.

Follow this JSON schema:
TaskPlan { originalPrompt: string; subtasks: Subtask[]; totalSubtasks: number; decompositionStrategy?: string }
Subtask { id: string (kebab-case), title: string, description: string (>=10 chars), status: one of pending|in_progress|completed|failed, dependencies: string[], estimatedComplexity: low|medium|high, successCriteria: string }
Constraints: 2-10 subtasks, actionable descriptions, include logical dependencies, avoid circular references, IDs unique.
Original prompt: Create a small library with one function and a unit test.
Clarifications:
None
Previous validation issues:
None
Respond ONLY with JSON matching the schema.

response:
{
  "originalPrompt": "Create a small library with one function and a unit test.",
  "decompositionStrategy": "Top-down iterative decomposition: specify the function behavior, create a minimal project scaffold, implement the function, create tests, run and fix until green, then add minimal packaging/docs. Each step depends on completion of earlier steps to avoid rework.",
  "subtasks": [
    {
      "id": "define-function-spec",
      "title": "Define function behavior and API",
      "description": "Write a clear specification: function name, inputs, outputs, edge cases, error handling, and example usage.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "A one-paragraph spec plus 2-3 example calls are documented and agreed; spec covers normal and edge cases."
    },
    {
      "id": "setup-project-structure",
      "title": "Set up minimal project scaffold",
      "description": "Create repository layout, language/runtime config, package manifest, source and test folders, and a simple build/test script.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "define-function-spec"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Repository contains src/ and tests/ (or language equivalent), a package manifest, and a script to run tests locally."
    },
    {
      "id": "implement-function",
      "title": "Implement the single function",
      "description": "Write the function code according to the spec with inline comments and basic input validation where required.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "define-function-spec",
        "setup-project-structure"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Function exists in the source folder, compiles (if applicable), and returns expected outputs for provided example inputs."
    },
    {
      "id": "write-unit-test",
      "title": "Create unit test for the function",
      "description": "Write one or more unit tests covering normal cases and at least one edge case; use the project's test framework and assert expected outputs.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "implement-function",
        "setup-project-structure"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Test file(s) run under the test script and include assertions for normal and edge cases; tests fail if function is incorrect."
    },
    {
      "id": "run-tests-and-fix",
      "title": "Execute tests and resolve issues",
      "description": "Run the test suite, diagnose failing tests, fix implementation or tests, and repeat until all tests pass reliably.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "write-unit-test",
        "implement-function"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "All tests pass consistently on a clean environment and CI/test script exits with success."
    },
    {
      "id": "prepare-readme-and-package",
      "title": "Add README and package/publish artifacts",
      "description": "Write a short README with usage examples and build a distributable package or artifact; include instructions to run tests.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "run-tests-and-fix"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "README documents usage and test instructions; package/build step succeeds and artifact is producible for distribution."
    }
  ],
  "totalSubtasks": 6
}
